agreement.full_name: Norway Generalised System of Preferences - Pakistan

notes: CORRECTION to earlier assumption in this conversation: Norway also has real tariff-line data (9,557 rows in 'Tariff Guidance' sheet, header row 10) - NOT purely a links-only/guidance-text module as I initially characterized before direct inspection. Row 6 confirms scheme-defined rules (industrial Ch 25-97 duty-free except List 7; agricultural Ch 01-24 per Lists 2-6) drove the Base_Rate/Preferential_Rate text, which is itself DESCRIPTIVE TEXT, not clean numbers (e.g. 'Line-specific MFN agricultural rate...', 'No ordinary-GSP reduction listed...') - RateParser will correctly fall to text_only/unspecified for nearly all rows here since there are no bare percentages in the sample seen. coverage='partial' per row 6's explicit statement that exact numerical MFN amounts must still be confirmed on live Tolltariffen. There is also a separate 'Tariff Data Completion Notes' hidden sheet (found in the original deep scan) not yet inspected for content - and a 'Norway Links' sheet for verification_links, deferred to a later loading step.
